sentence: En Chiloé se prepara el curanto en un hoyo con piedras.
ipa: en tʃiloe se pɾepaɾa el kuɾanto en un oʝo kon pjedɾas
gloss_en: In Chiloé the curanto is cooked in a pit with stones.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los vecinos hacen una minga para mover la casa.
ipa: los besinos asen una minɡa paɾa mobeɾ la kasa
gloss_en: The neighbours hold a minga to move the house.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi abuela cuenta cuentos de la Pincoya y el Trauco.
ipa: mi aβwela kwenta kwentos de la pinkoʝa i el tɾawko
gloss_en: My grandmother tells tales of the Pincoya and the Trauco.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El bote cruza el canal cuando baja la marea.
ipa: el bote kɾusa el kanal kwando baxa la maɾea
gloss_en: The boat crosses the channel when the tide goes out.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Nosotros juntamos leña seca para el fogón.
ipa: nosotɾos xuntamos leɲa seka paɾa el foɣon
gloss_en: We gather dry firewood for the hearth.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La lluvia cae sin parar durante todo el mes.
ipa: la ʝubja kae sin paɾaɾ duɾante toðo el mes
gloss_en: The rain falls nonstop the whole month.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Comimos milcao y chapaleles con chicharrón.
ipa: komimos milkao i tʃapaleles kon tʃitʃaron
gloss_en: We ate milcao and chapaleles with pork crackling.
notes: trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El cordero se asa despacio junto al fuego.
ipa: el koɾdeɾo se asa despasjo xunto al fweɣo
gloss_en: The lamb roasts slowly by the fire.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: ¿Vos vais a la fiesta del pueblo el domingo?
ipa: bos bajs a la fjesta del pweblo el dominɡo
gloss_en: Are you going to the town feast on Sunday?
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los pescadores salen temprano a buscar choros.
ipa: los peskaðoɾes salen tempɾano a buskaɾ tʃoɾos
gloss_en: The fishermen set out early to gather mussels.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La niña recoge manzanas para hacer chicha.
ipa: la niɲa rekoxe mansanas paɾa aseɾ tʃitʃa
gloss_en: The girl gathers apples to make chicha.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El caballo corre por la pampa mojada del campo.
ipa: el kaβaʝo kore poɾ la pampa moxaða del kampo
gloss_en: The horse runs across the wet field.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Traéme la olla que dejé en la cocina de fierro.
ipa: tɾaeme la oʝa ke dexe en la kosina de fjero
gloss_en: Bring me the pot I left on the iron stove.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El bosque guarda muchos helechos y musgos.
ipa: el boske ɡaɾda mutʃos eletʃos i musɡos
gloss_en: The forest holds many ferns and mosses.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Prende el chonchón que se cortó la luz.
ipa: pɾende el tʃontʃon ke se koɾto la lus
gloss_en: Light the oil lamp, the power went out.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi tío teje redes para pescar en el mar.
ipa: mi tio texe reðes paɾa peskaɾ en el maɾ
gloss_en: My uncle weaves nets to fish at sea.
notes: trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El zorro chilote se esconde entre los arbustos.
ipa: el soro tʃilote se eskonde entɾe los aɾbustos
gloss_en: The Chiloé fox hides among the bushes.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Hierve el agua para el mate de la tarde.
ipa: jeɾbe el aɡa paɾa el mate de la taɾde
gloss_en: Boil the water for the afternoon mate.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Corre a cerrar la puerta que entra el viento.
ipa: kore a seraɾ la pweɾta ke entɾa el bjento
gloss_en: Run to shut the door, the wind is coming in.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La señora vende papas nativas en la feria.
ipa: la seɲoɾa bende papas natibas en la feɾja
gloss_en: The lady sells native potatoes at the market.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.
